title: How do I reverse a string in Python?
body: Looking for the most Pythonic way.
author: devina

answers.body: Use slicing: `s[::-1]` — fastest and most idiomatic.
answers.author: pyguru

title: What is the difference between == and === in JavaScript?
author: jsnewbie

answers.body: `===` compares value AND type (strict). `==` coerces types first. Always prefer `===`.
answers.author: es_ninja

title: Rust borrow checker: cannot borrow as mutable more than once
body: Getting E0499. How do I restructure my code?
author: crab_fan
